home.introAttention: Your assistant has one item that needs attention before the day starts.
home.attentionSummary: EasyJet Christmas flight prices rose quickly for your London to Mallorca watch.
home.statusDefault: No new issues detected in your active travel, price and news watches.
home.statusWatching: I’m currently watching {count} things for you.
home.statusClear: No important changes since your last visit.

watches.title: All watches
watches.intro: Review the watch list and open any item for more context.
watches.empty: Everything is under control. No active watches right now.

detail.title: Watch detail
detail.confirmationCopy: I’ll let you know when something important changes.
detail.notFoundCopy: We could not find that watch. Please return to the watch list.

newWatch.title: New watch
newWatch.intro: Tell the assistant what to watch in plain language.
newWatch.label: What should I keep an eye on?
newWatch.placeholder: Tell me when EasyJet releases Christmas flights.
newWatch.exampleOne: Tell me when EasyJet releases Christmas flights.
newWatch.exampleThree: Let me know when this product drops below €200.
newWatch.hint: Paste a news article, type a request or speak naturally.
newWatch.urlHint: URL detected. I can watch that too.
newWatch.emptyError: Tell me what you would like me to watch.
newWatch.note: Just tell me what matters. I'll watch it for you.

followStory.title: Followed investigation
followStory.intro: A new update is available for your tracked supply chain story.
followStory.understoodCopy: The investigation shows that airport staff shortages are affecting cargo flow for holiday deliveries, which may impact the products you care about.
